programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 15

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: Helen Dorn: The Right To Remain Silent
programme.desc: During a hunting trip, Rolf Kanther, director of a military tech manufacturer, is shot right next to his daughter. Inspector Helen Dorn is sent to investigate the suspicious death, and needs to find out if it's an accident or a calculated murder.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: Carte Blanche
programme.desc: An uplifting tale of Kacper, a charismatic high school history teacher who hides his progressing blindness from everyone around him to fulfil his educational duties. His methods are unorthodox, sometimes hilarious, and devilishly effective.

programme.title: Av
programme.desc: While hitchhiking from Sofia to Ruse, Kamen meets Avé, a 17-year-old runaway girl. A compulsive liar, Avé keeps inventing new identities and backstories, which threaten to get Kamen deeper and deeper into trouble.

programme.title: Suso's Tower
programme.desc: When his best friend, Suso, dies, Cundo returns home for the first time in 10 years to say good-bye. He discovers Suso had a dream to build a tower so that he could see life from a different perspective. Cundo resolves to realise his friend’s wish.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 28
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Abhiyum Naanum - EP 5
programme.desc: "Abiyum Naanum" is a heartwarming family drama that follows 12-year-old Abimanyu, a boy genius on the autism spectrum, as he navigates the challenges of adolescence, school, and family life with a perspective that transforms the mundane into the magical.

programme.title: Theerpugal - EP 10
programme.desc: Theerpugal is a thrilling series that delves into some of the most notorious criminal cases in Singapore that captivated public attention. Each episode dramatizes the crime, meticulously traces the arguments of both the prosecution and the defense and concludes with the judges' verdicts and the reasoning behind them. This series is not only exciting and suspenseful but also highly informative and educational.

programme.title: Kannae Kaniamuthe S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Charu gets upset when a client backs out due to interference from an anonymous advocate. Sathish is annoyed that he is late for school because of Sara. At the preschool, Radha and Anjali share their problems, shaken form their previous experiences. A sudden appearance by Nila causes suspicion. Will things take a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Ticket Pottaachu - EP 5
programme.desc: Pestle and Mortar dives into the immersive experience of preparing staples in the most authentic means possible, a culinary experience like never before. It is a cooking shows that brings the audience onto roads less travelled. Each week brings the audience to exotic destinations with their own culture, stories, festivals and needless to say, epicurean ensemble. Back to basics-No more gas stoves and buying fish from the markets, pick up your firewood and start the fire!

programme.title: Ethiroli S23 - EP 1
programme.desc: Prepaid beauty packages are sold as convenience and savings — but for some consumers in Singapore, they have led to pressure selling, unfulfilled promises, financial loss and even physical harm. Ethiroli speaks to customers, experts and industry voices to examine the risks behind beauty packages, the protections available when things go wrong, and why trust and transparency matter more than ever in the beauty business.

programme.title: Udhayam Season 5 - EP 6
programme.desc: You won’t see the beneficiary’s face in this episode — but you’ll hear their truth, and it’ll stay with you. In a world that still judges those living with HIV, volunteer Jayalakshmi shows what it means to stand beside someone with compassion, not fear. This is about breaking stigma, one quiet act of care at a time.

programme.title: Oru Manithanin Kathai - EP 2
programme.desc: Oru Manithanin Kathai is a first of its kind docu-drama series that sheds light on ex-offenders and their return journey. Reintegration into the society and life beyond prison are the baseline for this series. Each episode dwells and tells stories of individuals who had been through the wrong and rough path served their sentences yet breaking stereotypes to be successful in life now.
